alerts.title: Former Google DeepMind researcher's AI startup raises record $1.1 billion seed funding to pursue superintelligence
alerts.description: Ineffable Intelligence has emerged from stealth with a $5.1 billion valuation.

alerts.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
alerts.description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

alerts.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
alerts.description: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 Could Change Global AI Model Race
alerts.description: The model maker released two versions of V4, both of which are open, cheap and use Huawei's AI chips for inference.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Boasts Coding Advancements, But Falls Short of Opus 4.7
alerts.description: While OpenAI has improved the model's coding and tool use ability, it still has room to improve in areas where Anthropic dominates.

alerts.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4-Cyber is More Open Than Claude Mythos
alerts.description: The model could help cybersecurity experts better prepare for attacks.
